member.name: T:Web_SNC.My.MyWebExtension
member.summary: Module used to define the properties that are available in the My Namespace for Web projects.

member.name: P:Web_SNC.My.MyWebExtension.Computer
member.summary: Returns information about the host computer.

member.name: P:Web_SNC.My.MyWebExtension.User
member.summary: Returns information for the current Web user.

member.name: T:Web_SNC.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Web_SNC.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Web_SNC.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.
